gloss: to complete a task or goal successfully
to bring about a desired outcome through sustained effort
to construct something by assembling its constituent parts
to bear or convey something from one place to another
to make or become different in some respect
to approach or arrive at a location or state
to direct or carry through an organized activity
to originate something new from intention or material
to bring something to a more advanced or complete state
to carry out an action or activity in general
to carry a plan or instruction through to completion
to give shape or structure to something
to cause something to come into being or occur
to come to possess or obtain something
to transfer possession of something to another party
to proceed from one place toward another
to retain possession or maintain a state over time
to bring something into existence by directed action
to change spatial position from one location to another
to enact a task or function through deliberate effort
to bring forth a result or output through process
to take in something delivered or transmitted from elsewhere
to cause something to travel from a source to a destination
to acquire or seize hold of something
to alter the form or nature of something fundamentally
to put something into service for a purpose
